title: A couple of misc questions about EoE
display_title: A couple of misc questions about EoE
wikitext:
[]: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by Nukie » Sat Jul 29, 2006 8:53 pm Hi, I'm Nukie. Long time lurker, first time poster/joiner. Anyway, onto my n00b questions. My first series of questions involves the eva series. 1) Did the Eva series deactivate after being attacked by Asuka, then reactivate? Judging by what Maya said/did (saying the "defeated" Eva series, reacting in disbelief), they did indeed deactivate. So were they just "playing dead" and buying time? Or did it have to do with the S^2? *augh* 2) SEELE did not have Lillith involved in their final plan. So how, then, did they expect to harvest the souls into the black moon? Would Shogouki take that role? My next is about Yui. 3) Although I sort of understand Yui's intentions (Prevent third impact, survive as humanities proof of existance) why would she put Shinji through it all, just to expect him to reject it. What if Shinji accepted Instrumentality. What would she do then? Some random questions: 4) What was Maya "searching for" (ep. 26?) 5) Was Pen-Pen complemented? I read the thread(s) about it at ANF, but didn't get a conclusive answer. My opinion is yes, because he is present in the pre-3I fight between A/S (Why would he be there otherwise?) 6) At first, I thought pre-3I was all in Shinji's mind. After extensive reading, I do concede that other people were there. But WHY wouldn't they go: "WTF!? I died? Why am I here? LOL" Why would Asuka let Shinji strangle her, if she was really there? I'm sorry for the length/stupidity of my questions. By no means do you have to answer any/all of them. Thank you in advance. 8) EDIT: Oh yeah-probably been explained, but why do Angels want to probe the human mind? and WTF was up with NPC ep 23 D:

[]: Re: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jul 29, 2006 9:42 pm 1) Did the Eva series deactivate after being attacked by Asuka, then reactivate? Judging by what Maya said/did (saying the "defeated" Eva series, reacting in disbelief), they did indeed deactivate. So were they just "playing dead" and buying time? Or did it have to do with the S^2? *augh* They were deactivated or "dead." The S2 engine is most likely what allowed them to reactive. 2) SEELE did not have Lillith involved in their final plan. So how, then, did they expect to harvest the souls into the black moon? Would Shogouki take that role? I got this from Bochan Bird's translated EoE script: "With the Lance of Longinus now lost, complementation using Lilith is impossible. Our only hope is to proceed with Eva-01, Lilith's sole clone." It appears that they had originally intended to use Lilith, but Unit 01 would be ok, too, since it is a clone of Lilith. 3) Although I sort of understand Yui's intentions (Prevent third impact, survive as humanities proof of existance) why would she put Shinji through it all, just to expect him to reject it. What if Shinji accepted Instrumentality. What would she do then? I don't think anyone knows the answer to this question. Perhaps she would just be happy knowing that her son is happy in whatever decision he chose? 4) What was Maya "searching for" (ep. 26?) I don't know. Maybe happiness or acceptance from Ritsuko? 5) Was Pen-Pen complemented? I read the thread(s) about it at ANF, but didn't get a conclusive answer. My opinion is yes, because he is present in the pre-3I fight between A/S (Why would he be there otherwise?) Probably not because complementation was for the next evolutionary step of humanity. And Pen-pen is definitely not human. 6) At first, I thought pre-3I was all in Shinji's mind. After extensive reading, I do concede that other people were there. But WHY wouldn't they go: "WTF!? I died? Why am I here? LOL" Why would Asuka let Shinji strangle her, if she was really there? I always assumed it was just in his head, maybe someone else can take this one? 8 ) Oh yeah-probably been explained, but why do Angels want to probe the human mind? To better understand the Lilim, which are simply alternate versions of what they could have become.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 30, 2006 1:41 am BrikHaus81, I think you more or less answered all the questions about as best as they can be answered.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Jul 30, 2006 4:24 am Actually, not only humans got Tangified. SEELE only talks about humans because, well, they're humans who only care about themselves. Given the sheer amount of souls it can't be just a few billions, because a soul is just a speck of light-so I guess all lifeforms got Tangified, because they too were born in the blue Earth.

[]: Re: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Sun Jul 30, 2006 6:26 am Nukie wrote: 8) EDIT: Oh yeah-probably been explained, but why do Angels want to probe the human mind? [size=1and WTF was up with NPC ep 23 D:[/size]

[]: Re: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 30, 2006 7:40 am 1) Asuka didn't destroy their cores, so the harpies were still alive, just heavily traumatised; so they could afford to take ten and wait for Kyoko-sama to show that unlike the energizer bunny, her batteries didn't keep on and on. 2) possibly - you really want someone like Reichu to give the latest reading. 3) good question 4) slightly more context, please? 5) It is likely that all life was tangified. 6) It was in Shinji's mind - just that he was sharing it with everyone else who had been complemented at the time. In dreams, such sudden things don't usually cause suprise - a waking dream is probably a good approximation to the state. The kitchen/coffee-pot scene is a flash-back/replay of the DC scene where Shinji makes a ham-fisted job of letting Asuka know that Kaji is probably dead. In a metaphorical sense, that was the thing that would have killed her (that was when she wandered off to find a convenient bath-tub to slash her wrists). In the waking dream of complementation, metaphor has the force of the real thing. extra) Which bit of DC23 - the angel-tower from EVA-00? The mysterious images overlaying the Reiquarium? Something else?

[]: Re: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 30, 2006 9:46 am Nukie wrote: 2) SEELE did not have Lillith involved in their final plan. So how, then, did they expect to harvest the souls into the black moon? Would Shogouki take that role?

[]: Re: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Jul 30, 2006 4:56 pm Nukie wrote: Hi, I'm Nukie. Long time lurker, first time poster/joiner. Anyway, onto my n00b questions. My first series of questions involves the eva series. 1) Did the Eva series deactivate after being attacked by Asuka, then reactivate? Judging by what Maya said/did (saying the "defeated" Eva series, reacting in disbelief), they did indeed deactivate. So were they just "playing dead" and buying time? Or did it have to do with the S^2? *augh*

[]: Re: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by Rawinder » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:55 pm Nukie wrote: 1) Did the Eva series deactivate after being attacked by Asuka, then reactivate? Judging by what Maya said/did (saying the "defeated" Eva series, reacting in disbelief), they did indeed deactivate. So were they just "playing dead" and buying time? Or did it have to do with the S^2? *augh*

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Mon Jul 31, 2006 6:28 pm Thank you all very much for replying. That answers most of my questions perfectly. Mr Tines: The "angel tower" from Unit 00. Well, here's my (useless) logic behind Pen-Pen being complemented that I just thought of: Humans evolved from apes, which evolved from other, lesser organisms. Instead of assuming only this line of species is Lillith-based, wouldn't it make sense for all sentient life on earth (except the angels) to be Lillith based as well? It's basically the primordial soup theory, excpt we have LCL. Of course, I'm assuming that in Eva evolution is what happened, although I think it is, because SEELE always talks about "evolutionary potential." Next we get into the complicated issue of whether animals have souls. I would say that {en Pen had a soul, and NOT solely based on intelligence. Mentally retarded humans most surely have souls, no? Pen-Pen clearly displays a personality and emotions (Although laziness, his most prominent, is not an emotion XD.) I know it is called the Human Instrumentality Project. I assume it's because Seele was more concerned with humans, since they, unlike other animals, had reached an evolutionary dead-end. Long winded explanation over.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Jul 31, 2006 10:47 pm It's called the Human Instrumentality Project because humans like to think that they're special, that they alone deserve to be above the other animals and were destined to be the true rulers of this world. If Pen-Pen were a sentient Tyrannosaur, I'm sure he'd beg to differ.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Aug 01, 2006 12:25 am Humans and Angels share 98% of the same genome. Not penguins and angels. Clearly by Eva lore, humans are indeed meant to be set apart from animals.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Aug 03, 2006 10:57 pm Timstuff wrote: Humans and Angels share 98% of the same genome. Not penguins and angels. Clearly by Eva lore, humans are indeed meant to be set apart from animals.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Fri Aug 04, 2006 12:09 am In response to 6- I always got the impression that 3I was happening to everyone , but we were only veiwing it from Shinji's point of veiw. People were talking to Shinji, as if he was the audience, and this gave me the impression that he was narrating the story because he also sees himself on the stage too.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Aug 04, 2006 3:36 am 3I was the Red Earth Purification Ceremony. Meaning, EVERYONE on the Blue Earth are affected. The Blue Earth is affected by Lilith's SoL, meaning the entire planet is touched by her. Life forms developed by the planet's climate and condition, hence, anything that crawled out of Lilith's primordial ooze is at least somehow her indirect child, and would be affected by 3I.

[]: Re: A couple of misc. questions about EoE.             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 05, 2006 10:16 pm Rawinder wrote: Most likely, yes. Remember what SEELE said: "God, humans, and all other lifeforms used death to become one."

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Mon Aug 07, 2006 4:23 am BobBQ wrote: Timstuff wrote: Humans and Angels share 98% of the same genome. Not penguins and angels. Clearly by Eva lore, humans are indeed meant to be set apart from animals.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 07, 2006 10:06 am Chimpanzees are Lilith-based life, besides. Adam's children are the True Successors from the White Moon, whose planet "we stole". But, come to think of it, we're stealing the planet from just about everybody at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Aug 07, 2006 10:55 am Mundane wrote: BobBQ wrote: Timstuff wrote: Humans and Angels share 98% of the same genome. Not penguins and angels. Clearly by Eva lore, humans are indeed meant to be set apart from animals.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 07, 2006 12:09 pm Angels are not Lilim, but Lilim are Angels.
